title: Maintain system administration tasks in Windows PowerShell
summary: This learning path covers cmdlets that are commonly used for system administration tasks related to Active Directory, network configuration, server administration, and Windows 10 device administration.

sections.title: Maintain system administration tasks in Windows PowerShell
sections.summary: This learning path covers cmdlets that are commonly used for system administration tasks related to Active Directory, network configuration, server administration, and Windows 10 device administration.

lessons.title: Manage Active Directory Domain Services using PowerShell cmdlets
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the cmdlets that are used to administer Active Directory Domain Services.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-active-directory-domain-services-use-powershell-cmdlets/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Active Directory Domain Services using PowerShell cmdlets

lessons.title: Manage network service settings for Windows devices using PowerShell cmdlets
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the PowerShell modules and cmdlets that are used to configure network settings for Windows devices.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-network-service-settings-for-windows-devices-use-powershell-cmdlets/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage network service settings for Windows devices using PowerShell cmdlets

lessons.title: Manage Windows Server settings using PowerShell cmdlets
lessons.content_md:
This module covers cmdlets that are used to configure settings related to Group Policy, Server Manager, Hyper-V, and Internet Information Services (IIS).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-windows-server-settings-use-powershell-cmdlets/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage Windows Server settings using PowerShell cmdlets

lessons.title: Manage settings for a local Windows machine using PowerShell cmdlets
lessons.content_md:
This module covers common PowerShell cmdlets that can be used to perform tasks on a local Windows 10 or Windows 11 computer.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-settings-for-local-windows-machine-use-powershell-cmdlets/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage settings for a local Windows machine using PowerShell cmdlets

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Maintain system administration tasks in Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Maintain system administration tasks in Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
